name: BFL (Big Fucking Lioness) - M1LF BAND1T
description:
"If I mention PT, you can probably name at least half a dozen other psychological horror games which, in no uncertain terms, tell me that because I am on Prozac and own a hammer, I am the natural predator of middle-class suburban families."

- Painticus, "The Granny Phenomenon"

I guess this is my contribution to Fat Girl February. It's also Valentine's Day themed, so enjoy!

Art is by band1t_nsfw, but beware that they make a lot of pregnancy content if you're not for that.
creator: The Blevinator
